phrases.intent_en: Ask where the produce weighing station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a balança para pesar os produtos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH buh-LAHNNG-suh PUH-ruh pih-ZAHR OOSH proo-DOO-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: In markets, produce is often sold by weight; the weighing station is typically adjacent to the fruit and vegetable section.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the produce weighing station is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a balança para pesar os produtos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH buh-LAHNNG-suh PUH-ruh pih-ZAHR OOSH proo-DOO-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Market staff prefer concise directions. Weighing stations are typically centralized for fresh produce.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um vendedor da Hortifruti.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR DUH oo-ruh-teef-roo-TEE.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a seller at the produce section.

responses.english: Ask a seller at the produce section.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR DUH oo-ruh-teef-roo-TEE.
responses.local: Pergunte a um vendedor da Hortifruti.

phrases.text_local: Recomende um restaurante tradicional perto daqui.
phrases.pronunciation: reh-koo-MAYNG-dih OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL PEHR-too duh-KEE.

likely_response.local: A Cantina do Mercado serve pratos típicos excelentes.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH kahnng-TEE-nuh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo SEH-ruh-vih PRAH-toosh TEE-pee-koosh ehsh-sih-LAYNG-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Market Cantina serves excellent typical dishes.

responses.english: The Market Cantina serves excellent typical dishes.
responses.phonetic: AH kahnng-TEE-nuh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo SEH-ruh-vih PRAH-toosh TEE-pee-koosh ehsh-sih-LAYNG-tihsh.
responses.local: A Cantina do Mercado serve pratos típicos excelentes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market café is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a Cantina do Mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH kahnng-TEE-nuh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese markets, 'Cantina' is a simple, affordable café or eatery often run by the market itself.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é ao fundo do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH OW FOONNG-doo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the back of the market.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the back of the market.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH OW FOONNG-doo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, é ao fundo do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the butcher counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do talho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO TAH-lyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Butchers often handle receipts separately. Staff give precise spatial cues.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o talho.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TAH-lyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the butcher.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the butcher.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TAH-lyoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o talho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fishmonger section is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a peixaria do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH pay-shuh-REEUH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fish counters are usually positioned for ventilation. Direct answers are standard.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fishmonger.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fishmonger.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.

likely_response.local: Procure pela banca de queijos regionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih PEH-luh BAHNNG-kuh DIH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Look for the regional cheese stall.

responses.english: Look for the regional cheese stall.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih PEH-luh BAHNNG-kuh DIH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
responses.local: Procure pela banca de queijos regionais.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os queijos regionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the regional cheeses.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the regional cheeses.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os queijos regionais.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fishmonger.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fishmonger.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional cheeses are sold
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar os queijos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR OOSH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Local cheeses are often grouped by vendor. Staff point to specific stalls.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os queijos regionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH KAY-zhoosh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH?
